item.name: Skaldminni
item.description:
Though it is said that this wavekin is the instrument of a fabled bard given life, the awkward flopping sound it makes when landed is anything but musical.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: “Strummed he upon a lonely rock, 'midst seas of blood and brine. A poet's love for wind and wave did weave through ev'ry line. Into the surf he cast his lute, a soul too deep bestirred. And lo, beneath the salty foam, his song can yet be heard.” - The Saga of the Skaldminni.
